classification.category_basis: 用于识别编码器、反馈器、传感器或信号连接器的针脚/信号定义，包括反馈接口 pinout、17-pin/15-pin/9-pin/多芯信号接口、引脚编号、VCC、+5V、+12V、GND、0V、A+/A-/B+/B-/Z+/Z-、U/V/W Hall、Hall A/B/C、SIN/COS、S+/S-、CLK/DATA、SD+/SD-、FG、Shield、NC、信号脚、屏蔽线、线色、接线说明、针脚分配表。必须体现信号功能、针脚编号、线序、线色或反馈接口定义；仅出现连接器外形、Housing、Terminal、线束走向或安装位置时，不应归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪区域是连接器针脚表，完整源图中对应标注为'17 PIN Encoder Connector'。表内可见'Pin'、'Fuction'、'COLOR'列，并列出'DC+5V'、'GND'、'A'、'/A'、'B'、'/B'、'U'、'/U'、'V'、'/V'、'Z'、'/Z'、'W'、'/W'、'NC'及线色，属于编码器反馈接口的针脚与信号定义。

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪区域显示圆形17针连接器端面外形、孔位编号以及型号文字'YL221ZJ'和'17 PIN'，但该区域未给出针脚功能、信号名、线色或接线对应关系，因此按连接器外形与孔位结构归入机械尺寸类。

language_processing_rules.original_text_policy: Preserve visible source text exactly; pin numerals are retained as original callouts.
language_processing_rules.unit_rule: No dimensional unit is stated in IMAGE 1; do not assign units to pin identifiers.
language_processing_rules.terminology_rules: Use connector terminology for visible pin numbering; do not infer hidden connector model or electrical function from context image.

dimension_records.normalized_specification_en: Connector face shows pin identifiers 1 through 17.
dimension_records.normalized_specification_zh: 连接器端面显示针脚编号1至17。
dimension_records.engineering_notes: Pin numbers identify connector contact positions only; no electrical signal assignment is visible in IMAGE 1.

frontend_table_records.specification: Connector face shows pin identifiers 1 through 17.

audit_table_records.normalized_specification: 连接器端面显示针脚编号1至17。

mounting_interface.zh: IMAGE 1未显示安装尺寸或固定孔规格。
mounting_interface.en: No mounting dimensions or fastening specifications are visible in IMAGE 1.

shaft_and_key_interface.zh: IMAGE 1未显示轴、键或键槽信息。
shaft_and_key_interface.en: No shaft, key, or keyway information is visible in IMAGE 1.

overall_envelope_and_clearance.zh: IMAGE 1仅为连接器端面局部视图，未标注外形尺寸或间隙要求。
overall_envelope_and_clearance.en: IMAGE 1 is a local connector face view with no overall envelope or clearance dimensions marked.

connector_considerations.zh: 可见信息为17个针脚位置编号；未显示型号、方向键说明、接线定义或尺寸公差。
connector_considerations.en: Visible information consists of 17 pin position identifiers; model, keying description, wiring assignment, dimensional tolerances, and units are not visible.

missing_or_unresolved_data.zh: 未在IMAGE 1中看到连接器型号文字、17 PIN文字、针脚功能表或任何尺寸标注。
missing_or_unresolved_data.en: Connector model text, 17 PIN label, pin-function table, and dimensional callouts are not visible in IMAGE 1.

unresolved_items.issue: Connector model and 17 PIN caption are not visible in IMAGE 1; not extracted as authoritative text.
unresolved_items.impact: Connector identity and formal pin count label cannot be recorded from the target crop.

unresolved_items.issue: No dimensional callouts, units, tolerances, or signal assignments are visible in IMAGE 1.
unresolved_items.impact: Only pin identifiers can be captured as direct engineering data.

classification.category_basis:
用于识别动力连接器或电源接口的针脚/接线定义，包括动力接口 pinout、引脚编号与针脚功能对应关系、针脚名称、U/V/W/PE、L/N/PE、DC+/DC-、P+/P-、Brake+/Brake-、制动器、电源正负极、保护地、相线、线色、线径、端子号、接线说明、连接器针位图、针脚分配表。

必须同时满足：
1. 出现连接器针脚、端子或接口信息；
2. 至少有一个针脚编号与功能、信号名、线色、线序、电源极性、相线、保护地或接线关系对应。

仅有引脚编号，但没有功能定义，不应归入本类。
仅出现 Power Wire、Housing、Terminal、连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、连接器安装位置、接插件外形图、插头/插座物料信息时，不应归入本类。
仅显示 1/2/3/4 等孔位编号和 Housing/Terminal 型号，应归入 connector_housing_terminal 或 connector_structure，不应归入 power_connector_pinout。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪区域是全图左上角标注的6针动力连接器表格，包含'Pin'、'Function'、'COLOR'三列，并将引脚1至4分别对应到'U'、'V'、'W'、'PE'及线色'YELLOW'、'RED'、'BLACK'、'YELLOW/GREEN'，体现动力相线和保护地的针脚接线定义。

classification.category_basis:
用于识别动力连接器或电源接口的针脚/接线定义，包括动力接口 pinout、引脚编号与针脚功能对应关系、针脚名称、U/V/W/PE、L/N/PE、DC+/DC-、P+/P-、Brake+/Brake-、制动器、电源正负极、保护地、相线、线色、线径、端子号、接线说明、连接器针位图、针脚分配表。

必须同时满足：
1. 出现连接器针脚、端子或接口信息；
2. 至少有一个针脚编号与功能、信号名、线色、线序、电源极性、相线、保护地或接线关系对应。

仅有引脚编号，但没有功能定义，不应归入本类。
仅出现 Power Wire、Housing、Terminal、连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、连接器安装位置、接插件外形图、插头/插座物料信息时，不应归入本类。
仅显示 1/2/3/4 等孔位编号和 Housing/Terminal 型号，应归入 connector_housing_terminal 或 connector_structure，不应归入 power_connector_pinout。
classification.reason: 目标框内为圆形6针连接器端面，清晰标出针位编号1至6，并标注型号'YL2046ZJ-Y'与'6 PIN'；结合完整图中该区域属于'6 Pin Power Connector'，用于说明电机动力接口的针脚位置与接线定义。

text_annotations.ambiguity_note: Tight box on the gray numeral 1 only, excluding the surrounding circular connector outline.
Tight box on the right-side numeral 2 only, excluding the connector circle.
Tight box on the left-side numeral 3 only, excluding the connector circle.
Tight box on the central numeral 4 only, excluding the surrounding connector outline.
Tight box on the lower-right numeral 5; glyph is small and slightly blurred.
Tight box on the lower-left numeral 6; glyph is small and slightly blurred.

drawing_metadata.drawing_context: Circular front-face pin layout crop for a connector; full-context image indicates this region belongs to a 6 Pin Power Connector, but only pin numerals are visible in IMAGE 1.
drawing_metadata.assumed_unit_rule: Millimeters may apply to the mechanical drawing overall, but no dimensional units are visible in this crop.

language_processing_rules.original_text_policy: Preserve visible source text exactly; do not use non-visible context text as original callout.
language_processing_rules.unit_rule: No dimensional unit visible in IMAGE 1; do not infer numeric dimensions from geometry.
language_processing_rules.terminology_rules: Use connector pin/cavity terminology for numbered circular connector face annotations.
ambiguous_terms: Visible numerals identify positions, but electrical functions and connector part number are not visible in IMAGE 1.

dimension_records.normalized_specification_en: Six visible numbered pin/cavity positions are identified: 1 through 6.
dimension_records.normalized_specification_zh: 可见六个针位/孔位编号：1至6。
dimension_records.engineering_notes_en: The crop shows positional identifiers only; pin electrical functions are not visible in IMAGE 1.
dimension_records.engineering_notes_zh: 该裁剪图仅显示位置编号；IMAGE 1中未显示各针位电气功能。

frontend_table_records.specification: Six visible numbered pin/cavity positions are identified: 1 through 6.

audit_table_records.normalized_specification: 可见六个针位/孔位编号：1至6。

mounting_interface.zh: 该区域未显示安装孔、法兰或机械安装尺寸。
mounting_interface.en: No mounting holes, flange dimensions, or mechanical mounting dimensions are visible in this crop.

shaft_and_key_interface.zh: 该区域不包含轴、键或键槽信息。
shaft_and_key_interface.en: No shaft, key, or keyway information is present in this crop.

overall_envelope_and_clearance.zh: 可见圆形连接器端面外形，但没有可直接读取的外形尺寸或间隙尺寸。
overall_envelope_and_clearance.en: A circular connector face outline is visible, but no readable envelope or clearance dimensions are provided.

connector_considerations.zh: 可见1至6号针位编号；完整上下文表明该区域属于6针电源连接器，但型号、针脚功能和接线定义未在IMAGE 1中可见。
connector_considerations.en: Pin positions 1 through 6 are visible; the full context indicates this region belongs to a 6-pin power connector, but the connector model, pin functions, and wiring definitions are not visible in IMAGE 1.

missing_or_unresolved_data.zh: 缺少连接器型号、6 PIN文字、针脚功能表、尺寸、方向基准和公差等可见标注。
missing_or_unresolved_data.en: Connector model, 6 PIN label, pin function table, dimensions, orientation datum, and tolerances are not visible in the target crop.

unresolved_items.issue_zh: IMAGE 1中未显示连接器标题、型号或6 PIN文字。
unresolved_items.issue_en: Connector title, model, and 6 PIN label are not visible in IMAGE 1.
unresolved_items.impact: Do not record these as direct text annotations or direct callouts.

unresolved_items.issue_zh: IMAGE 1中未显示针脚功能定义。
unresolved_items.issue_en: Pin function assignments are not visible in IMAGE 1.
unresolved_items.impact: Only pin/cavity position identifiers can be extracted.

unresolved_items.issue_zh: IMAGE 1中没有尺寸、公差或单位标注。
unresolved_items.issue_en: No dimensions, tolerances, or units are shown in IMAGE 1.
unresolved_items.impact: No dimensional measurement records can be extracted from this crop.

Inductance line-line LL （mH）10.1（avg）

Voltage constant Ke （V/krpm）125
Torque constant Kt （Nm/A）2.07
Rotor moment of inertia Jm （Kg.cm²）63.1
Max. voltage rising du/dt （KV/μ s）8
Insulation classF
Max. radial force Fr（N）1200
Max. axial force Fa（N）600
Weight （Kg）18
Feed back device2500p/rev incremental encoder
OIH48-TS5214N8566
Temperature sensorn. a.
Cooling methodTotally enclosed non-ventilated
protection levelIP65, shaft sealing IP54

classification.category_basis: 用于识别电机性能曲线类图纸或图表，包括扭矩-转速曲线、转速-扭矩关系、连续扭矩、峰值扭矩、间歇扭矩、额定扭矩、最大扭矩、转速范围、额定转速、最高转速、工作区间、S1/S2/S3 工作制、短时运行区、连续运行区、功率曲线、效率曲线等。典型特征是坐标轴、曲线、工作区域、转速单位 rpm/r/min、扭矩单位 Nm/N·m。
classification.reason: 目标框为电机技术数据表，包含可见的'Rated Torque TN （N. m）'、'Maximum torque Tm （N. m）'、'Rated Speed Nn （rpm）'等扭矩与转速性能参数；在给定类别中最接近扭矩-转速性能信息。

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪区域展示电机侧视和端面视图，包含外形长度、轴径、法兰孔、安装孔、角度、公差及连接器物理位置标注，如 '282±1.5'、'φ130'、'M8 Deep 25'、'6 PIN MOTOR CONNECTOR'、'17 PIN ENCODER CONNECTOR'。连接器仅标出安装位置和外形位置，没有针脚功能或接线定义，因此归入机械尺寸。

title.title_zh: 电机外形及安装尺寸图
title.title_en: Motor Outline and Mounting Dimensions Drawing

text_annotations.correction_note: Added spaces to OCR text; discarded overlapping partial OCR ocr_002.
Restored diameter symbol and upper deviation 0 from visible engineering callout.
Corrected OCR symbol '$' to diameter symbol and restored upper deviation 0.
Merged thread callout with depth note and added space.
Corrected missing diameter symbol in hole quantity callout.

terminology_notes: Deep denotes thread or hole depth.
translation_notes: Connector labels are preserved in English; engineering parameter names are translated to Chinese.

dimension_records.reason: Text is a connector label with leader pointing to the motor connector.
Text is a connector label with leader pointing to the encoder connector.
Small shaft/key detail shows 8 dimension across the rectangular key feature.
Small shaft/key detail shows 10 dimension across the key section height.
Small detail view dimension spans the key length.
Dimension is placed at the shaft shoulder step near the key feature.
Dimension spans the top keyed section length on the shaft.
Vertical diameter callout is attached to the shaft end cylindrical feature.
Vertical diameter callout is associated with the mounting pilot/locating diameter.
Dimension spans the exposed shaft extension from the end face to the shoulder.
Small axial dimension near the shaft shoulder indicates a local relief or clearance feature.

dimension_records.parameter_en: End face to body offset distance
dimension_records.reason: Small axial dimension is located between the shaft-side flange/end face and motor body reference.
Bottom dimension spans the shaft-side extension region.
Bottom dimension spans the main motor body length.
Vertical callout at motor side view marks maximum overall height.
Diameter callout points to the bolt hole pitch circle on the front mounting face.
Leader points to threaded holes on the front face and combines thread size with depth note.
Hole callout on front face specifies quantity and diameter.
Angular dimension on right side of front view defines hole orientation.
Angular dimension on left side of front view defines hole orientation.
Bottom front-view dimension indicates two equal mounting center spacings of 150.

frontend_table_records.parameter: End face to body offset distance

audit_table_records.parameter_en: End face to body offset distance

engineering_summary.mounting_interface: Front mounting interface includes Φ165±0.1 pitch circle, 4-Φ11 holes, M8 deep 25 threaded holes, 45° angular references, and 2-150 spacing.
engineering_summary.shaft_and_key_interface: Shaft interface includes Φ32 0/-0.016 shaft diameter, Φ130 0/-0.04 locating diameter, 58±0.1 extension, 63±1 total shaft-side length, and key/detail dimensions 8, 10, 50, 5, 50.
engineering_summary.overall_envelope_and_clearance: Main body length is 282±1.5 and maximum height is 174 MAX; local clearance/relief dimensions include 3.5 and 12.
engineering_summary.connector_considerations: Top connectors are labeled as 6 PIN MOTOR CONNECTOR and 17 PIN ENCODER CONNECTOR.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: No additional visible OCR-supported text is required for this crop; duplicate and noise OCR readings were excluded.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别电机性能曲线类图纸或图表，包括扭矩-转速曲线、转速-扭矩关系、连续扭矩、峰值扭矩、间歇扭矩、额定扭矩、最大扭矩、转速范围、额定转速、最高转速、工作区间、S1/S2/S3 工作制、短时运行区、连续运行区、功率曲线、效率曲线等。典型特征是坐标轴、曲线、工作区域、转速单位 rpm/r/min、扭矩单位 Nm/N·m。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪区域在完整图纸左下角蓝框内，为扭矩 T 与转速 n 的曲线图，横轴标注 'n (rpm)'，纵轴标注 'T (N.m)'，并包含 'Intermittent' 与 'Continous' 工作区间，以及 49.5、45、19.8、18 等扭矩点和 0 至 3500 rpm 转速刻度，属于电机扭矩-转速性能曲线。

text_annotations.correction_note: Selected complete high-confidence reading; discarded overlapping fragment ocr_002.
Selected numeric label; discarded overlapping noise ocr_005.
Normalized spacing from OCR text T(N.m).
Selected numeric label; discarded overlapping noise ocr_015.
Corrected spelling from Continous- and ignored overlapping OCR fragments.

drawing_metadata.unit_assumption: Graph torque unit shown as N.m; speed unit rpm visible in image but OCR source_id not available

terminology_notes: Corrected Intermittent and Continuous OCR spelling for engineering readability.
The graph uses N.m for torque and rpm for rotational speed.

dimension_records.reason: The vertical axis label identifies torque as the plotted engineering quantity.

dimension_records.normalized_specification_en: Torque scale from 0 to 60 N.m in 10 N.m increments
dimension_records.normalized_specification_zh: 转矩刻度0至60 N.m，间隔10 N.m
dimension_records.reason: These labels are aligned on the torque axis and define the graph scale.

dimension_records.normalized_specification_en: Speed scale from 0 to 3000 rpm in 500 rpm increments; 3500 tick visible but OCR source not available
dimension_records.normalized_specification_zh: 转速刻度0至3000 rpm，间隔500 rpm；3500可见但无可用OCR source_id

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框位于整张机械外形图右侧技术表下方，是'Environmental conditions'表格，列出'Temperature'、'Humidity'、'Environment'和'Installation altitude'等使用环境条件；不含扭矩转速曲线或连接器针脚定义，在给定类别中最接近机械图纸附属技术信息。

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框位于完整图纸标题栏的未注公差区域，内容包含'DECIMALS:'、'.X ±0.5'、'.XX ±0.25'、'.XXX ±0.1'、'ANGULAR: ±0°30′'、'UNIT: mm'和'DO NOT SCALE DRAWING'，用于规定机械图尺寸与角度公差，属于机械尺寸图纸信息。
